summary: Daily Prompts Phase 1 implementation - ALL 19 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Verified: Today's prompt endpoint with has_buzzed_in/streak fields, buzz-in flow with duplicate prevention, export card generation (1080x1080 PNG), streak tracking, admin prompt manager, and Discogs image caching. Frontend tests confirmed Daily Prompt card at top of Hive feed, buzzed-in status with streak badge (fire icon), DAILY_PROMPT post type rendering, and profile streak badge.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works with demo@example.com / password123
Backend: GET /api/prompts/today returns today's prompt with has_buzzed_in and streak fields
Backend: GET /api/prompts/today requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns user's streak count
Backend: GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns 404 for unknown user
Backend: POST /api/prompts/buzz-in requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/prompts/buzz-in requires prompt_id and record_id
Backend: POST /api/prompts/buzz-in returns 400 if already buzzed in today
Backend: POST /api/prompts/export-card requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/prompts/export-card requires response_id
Backend: POST /api/prompts/export-card returns 404 for invalid response_id
Backend: POST /api/prompts/export-card generates 1080x1080 PNG image (34KB)
Backend: GET /api/prompts/admin/all returns all prompts (31 total)
Backend: GET /api/prompts/admin/all requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/prompts/admin/create creates new prompt
Backend: POST /api/prompts/admin/create requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/prompts/discogs-hires/{release_id} fetches and caches Discogs data
Backend: GET /api/prompts/discogs-hires/{release_id} requires authentication
Frontend: Daily Prompt card appears at TOP of The Hive feed above all posts
Frontend: Daily Prompt card shows prompt text 'the record you'd save in a fire'
Frontend: Daily Prompt card shows 'buzzed in' status (user already responded)
Frontend: Daily Prompt card shows streak badge with fire icon (🔥 1)
Frontend: DAILY_PROMPT post type renders with 'Daily Prompt' badge
Frontend: DAILY_PROMPT post shows prompt text, album art, title/artist, caption
Frontend: Profile page shows streak badge with fire icon below stats

test_credentials.notes: demo user is admin with is_admin=true, already buzzed in for today's prompt with streak=1

seed_data_creation: 30 seed prompts pre-populated on server startup (SEED_PROMPTS array), 1 additional test prompt created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Prompts Phase 1 fully working. Demo user has already buzzed in for today's prompt (response_id: 66cf6933-46d1-4280-80f9-e0d5f8a0d660). To test buzz-in flow on a new prompt, create a new prompt via POST /api/prompts/admin/create with a today's date, then use a different user. Export card endpoint returns binary PNG - test with responseType: 'blob'. Fonts for Pillow at /app/backend/fonts/. Image cache collection stores Discogs album art. All 30 SEED_PROMPTS scheduled starting from today's date.

export_card.output: 1080x1080 PNG with prompt text, album art, title/artist, date, branding
